sections.content: The purple diamond moved even closer to the gray diamond. Let me check the current positions and see if they've merged or if I need to click again.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find all colored diamonds
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['p', 'M', 'G', 'W'] and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the area around purple and gray diamonds
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Diamond area (rows 52-62, cols 24-34) ===")
for r in range(52, 62):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][24:34]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
